figures.title: 美国30年期国债收益率持续保持在5%以上
figures.analysis: 彭博「今日图表」柱状图对比2007–2026年30年期国债收益率高于5%的交易日天数，2026年柱高约28日、显著高于2023–2025年、为2007年以来最多；结合Jul 22 30y约5.14%且连续12日高于5%（华尔街见闻），长端利率黏性抬升主权再融资与股权估值压力——在Jul 23 Brent 盘中逼近$99（第一财经）与Mag 7 capex再上调背景下，市场定价更偏「更高更久」。

figures.note: Intraday spot — not official settle; Jul 22 settle Brent $94.07

marketTone: Jul 22 Mag 7 earnings split the AI tape — Alphabet cloud +82% but FY26 capex raised to $195–205bn (stock −4% AMC) while Tesla revenue +26% missed on opex +47% and negative FCF (stock −5% AMC). Brent settled $94.07 (+3.36%) on Houthi Red Sea tanker hits; Jul 23 Asia Brent intraday ~$98.59 (+4.8%, 第一财经). Jul 23 China official close: Shanghai +0.25% to 3876.78 with >4200 stocks up but semis (华虹 −12%+) and STAR50 −3.78% lag — grid/oil/resources led. 30y held ~5.14% for a record 12th day above 5% (Bloomberg chart ~28 YTD days >5%).

summary.text: Jul 22 US official close (Motley Fool/Yahoo): S&P −0.14% to 7,498.96, Nasdaq −0.57% to 25,690.90, Dow −0.01% to 52,218.58 — energy led while tech softened ahead of Mag 7 AMC. Brent settled $94.07 (+3.36%) and WTI $86.83 (+2.95%) after Houthi missile hits on Saudi Red Sea tankers (CBS Jul 22); 10y ~4.63% (+3 bp) and 30y ~5.14% (12th straight day above 5%).

Alphabet Q2 (Jul 22 AMC, CNBC): revenue $119.8bn (+24%), Google Cloud $24.8bn (+82%), Q2 capex $44.9bn; FY26 capex guide raised to $195–205bn from $180–190bn — stock −4% as free cash flow turned negative; CoreWeave +3.7% AMC on third-party capacity bridge.

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: Tesla Q2 (Jul 22 AMC, CNBC): revenue $28.24bn (+26%, beat) but adj EPS $0.33 vs ~$0.51 est (miss estimate); operating expenses +47% to $4.35bn; FCF −$1.09bn (first negative quarter in 2+ years); operating margin 1.4% vs 4.1% y/y — stock −5% AMC.

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: Middle East supply chain (Jul 22–23): US strike night 11+; Iran warns Hormuz closure if US hits infrastructure; Houthis hit Saudi Red Sea tankers — crude Asia open jumped (彭博 Jul 23). Trump threatens Iran Fordow; Amazon AWS Bahrain data center hit again (华尔街见闻 3777692).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: China Jul 22 (MOF briefing): H1 general public budget revenue +4.7% to ¥12.10tn, expenditure +1.5% to ¥14.33tn; stamp tax +97.3%; 6月财政支出创去年10月以来最大降幅、上半年广义赤字同比收窄13%（彭博 Jul 23）。王毅会见卢比奥，筹备下阶段高层交往；白宫指责月之暗面Kimi K3不当使用禁售英伟达芯片（彭博/第一财经 Jul 21–23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: Jul 23 China official close (金融界/格隆汇 Jul 23): Shanghai +0.25% to 3876.78, Shenzhen +0.44% to 14123.31, ChiNext +0.25% to 3575.52; turnover ¥2.21tn (−¥459bn d/d), >4200 stocks up. Grid equipment/oil/resources led; semis weak (华虹宏力 −12%+, 中芯国际 −6%+) and STAR50 −3.78%. Jul 23 Brent intraday ~$98.59 (+4.8%) and WTI >$90 (+4.07%) per 第一财经 17:26.

signal: Jul 23 China tape stabilized — indices micro-up on breadth (>4200 advancers) but semis/STAR50 still de-risking after Jul 22 profit-taking. Mag 7 AMC split (Alphabet cloud +82% vs $195–205bn capex/−4%; Tesla opex +47%/FCF −$1.09bn/−5%) keeps AI falsifier live. Brent Jul 22 settle $94.07 + Jul 23 intraday ~$98.59 and 30y 12 days >5% (~28 YTD per Bloomberg chart) anchor oil→rates ahead of Jul 23 ECB hold (20:15 CET) and 20:30 US claims.
watch: Do Alphabet/Tesla AMC capex/profit guides mark the start of a second AI de-risk leg — and does Jul 23 ECB hold at 2.25% deposit with Lagarde hawkish on oil pass-through keep 30y above 5% even if Hormuz headlines fade?
globalRegime: Fed holds 3.50%–3.75% with Jul 14–15 CPI/PPI misses backward-looking while Jul 22 Brent $94.07 (+3.36%) and 30y ~5.14% (12 days >5%) re-price forward inflation on Hormuz + Red Sea chokepoints. Jul 22 Mag 7 earnings (Alphabet/Tesla AMC) are the AI capex falsifier; traders split on Sep hike with no Fed guidance (彭博 Jul 23). Jul 23 ECB expected hold at 2.25% deposit after Jun +25bp hike.

globalChanged.text: Alphabet季度云业务营收超预期，该公司再度上调今年资本支出预估至1950亿–2050亿美元（中值超2000亿美元），高于分析师平均预期的约1860亿美元；Q2 capex 449亿美元，自由现金流转负。Alphabet股价盘后下跌约4%（彭博 Jul 23； CNBC Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 特斯拉季度利润远逊华尔街预期：Q2 revenue $28.24bn (+26%) but adj EPS $0.33 vs ~$0.51 est (miss estimate); operating expenses +47% to $4.35bn; FCF −$1.09bn — first negative quarter in 2+ years; operating margin 1.4% vs 4.1% y/y. Tesla盘后跌约5%（CNBC Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: IBM Q2（华尔街见闻 Jul 23）：营收172亿美元（约+1%）低于预期，全年增速指引从逾5%下调至4%–5%；Z系列大型机营收同比骤降42%。德州仪器发布乐观业绩展望但股价盘后下跌（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 美军对伊朗发动新一轮空袭，特朗普进一步加大对伊朗的威胁；伊朗军方称若美国袭击桥梁等基础设施，德黑兰将禁止任何石油通过霍尔木兹海峡出口（彭博 Jul 23）。胡塞武装在红海袭击沙特油轮，原油亚洲开盘飙升（CBS Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 美国30年期国债收益率今年位于5%以上的交易天数创近二十年来最多（彭博今日图表 Jul 23）；Jul 22 30y ~5.14%，连续12个交易日高于5%（华尔街见闻 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 美联储将于下周公布利率决议；缺乏前瞻指引，交易员对是否加息存在明显分歧（彭博 Jul 23）。美银客户数据显示上周散户买入美股规模创逾一年来最高（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: OpenAI披露其AI模型在测试中意外入侵Hugging Face，引发对先进AI网络攻击能力的担忧（彭博 Jul 23；华尔街见闻 Jul 23）。AMD将向Anthropic投资至多50亿美元并供应芯片（彭博/华尔街见闻 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 欧盟委员会有条件批准派拉蒙天舞以1100亿美元收购华纳兄弟探索公司的交易（彭博 Jul 23）。苹果据悉拟全面升级Mac产品线（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: Jul 22 US official close (Motley Fool): S&P 7,498.96 (−0.14%), Nasdaq 25,690.90 (−0.57%), Dow 52,218.58 (−0.01%); SMCI +26% on record backlog; gold +1.49% to $4,137.10 at US close.
Jul 22 rates/commodities (华尔街见闻 Jul 23): 10y +3.45 bp to 4.6626% intraday high; 2y 4.3042%; Brent $94.07 (+3.36%) settle; WTI $86.83 (+2.95%); gold $4,130.07 (+1.31%).
Jul 23 oil intraday (第一财经 17:26): WTI futures >$90/bbl (+4.07%); Brent +4.8% to ~$98.59/bbl — follows Jul 22 settle Brent $94.07 and 胡塞武装Jul 23 凌晨红海袭击沙特油轮（第一财经/新华社）。

globalImplies.text: Alphabet cloud +82% validates AI demand but $195–205bn capex guide shifts the falsifier from revenue to cash-burn — Jul 22 AMC −4% mirrors Jul 16 TSMC margin-fear playbook.
Red Sea tanker hits add a second chokepoint to Hormuz near-zero transits — Brent $94.07 settle can stick even on ceasefire headlines unless vessel counts recover.
30y spending more 2026 days above 5% than any year since 2007 (Bloomberg chart) caps equity multiple expansion even when Mag 7 revenue beats.

globalTensions: Alphabet cloud +82% vs capex $195–205bn and negative FCF; Tesla revenue +26% vs EPS miss and opex +47%; Jul 22 S&P −0.14% vs Brent $94.07; 30y >5% vs Jul 14–15 CPI/PPI misses; Fed hike debate vs retail record buying.
chinaStance: Fiscal tightening signal — Jun expenditure largest drop since Oct 2025 and H1 broad deficit narrowed 13% y/y (彭博 Jul 23) despite MOF H1 expenditure +1.5%; no LPR-cut signal while Brent ≥$94. Diplomatic channel active (王毅–卢比奥); AI IP friction (白宫 vs 月之暗面) keeps tech/trade risk live.

chinaChanged.text: 中国6月财政支出创去年10月份以来最大降幅，上半年广义赤字同比收窄13%，表明财政政策进一步收紧（彭博 Jul 23）。MOF Jul 22：上半年全国一般公共预算收入121047亿元（+4.7%），支出143329亿元（+1.5%）；证券交易印花税同比大增97.3%。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 中国财政部（Jul 22 MOF briefing）：上半年新增专项债券发行2.07万亿元，发行进度47%，主要用于市政和产业园区、交通、城市更新等重点领域。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 中国外长王毅与美国国务卿卢比奥会晤，要求美国尊重中国核心利益，双方筹备下阶段高层交往；卢比奥称中美正推进设立投资和贸易理事会（彭博 Jul 23；新华社 via 华尔街见闻 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 王毅在会见菲律宾外长时当面抗议菲律宾在仁爱礁的冲撞行为，敦促马尼拉停止在涉海问题上的挑衅行为（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 白宫官员指责月之暗面在开发Kimi K3时不当使用美国AI模型和对华禁售的英伟达芯片；OpenAI总裁Altman称Kimi K3「相当不错」但不确定是否蒸馏（彭博 Jul 23；第一财经 Jul 21 Kimi回应）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 耐克计划2027年1月起终止中国内地数百家经销商线上销售协议，加大对自有零售门店投资；Topsports股价周三跌近25%（彭博 Jul 23； Caixin Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 路透报道京东以25亿美元收购Ceconomy的交易最早周三可能面临欧盟补贴指控（彭博 Jul 23）。百度确认已收到香港第二上市转双重主要上市申请，预计年内生效（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 交易员称部分中国炼油商趁油价回升向韩国、台湾等地转售中东原油（彭博 Jul 23）。中国体育总局发布体育强国「十五五」规划，2030年体育产业总规模突破7万亿元（彭博 Jul 23）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: Jul 23 A-share official close (金融界 Jul 23): 沪指 +0.25%至3876.78，深成指 +0.44%至14123.31，创业板 +0.25%至3575.52；科创50指数跌3.78%至1789.69点。三市成交2.2万亿元（较上日缩量4590亿元），超4200股上涨——电网设备近30股涨停、油气/锂矿/贵金属走强，半导体（华虹宏力跌超12%）与白酒（古井贡酒近−7%）承压。
Caixin Jul 23：中国公募基金Q2净利润1.94万亿元（约2870亿美元），结束连续两季亏损；主动偏股基金大举转向AI/科技，TMT持仓高度集中——与Jul 23盘面半导体回调形成对照。
首尔经济 Jul 22：外资7月20–22日KOSPI连续3日净买入合计3.457万亿韩元，22日单日2.622万亿，集中在SK海力士/三星电子；Alphabet capex上调至1950亿–2050亿美元（CNBC Jul 22）验证AI投入。新浪财经 Jul 23：长鑫科技公告7月27日科创板上市（688825）。
Jul 22 A-share official close (华尔街见闻 Jul 23): 上证 +0.07% to 3867.03, 深证 −1.42%, 创业板 −3.23% — profit-taking after Jul 21 chip V-reversal.

chinaImplies.text: Jun fiscal expenditure drop + H1 deficit narrowing signal quantity tightening even as MOF reports +1.5% H1 spending — oil import inflation and stamp-tax revenue surge complicate easing expectations.
Kimi K3 IP scrutiny (白宫) vs Altman praise keeps China AI narrative two-sided — diplomatic channel (王毅–卢比奥) active but tech decoupling risk not priced out.

Jul 23 onshore stabilization with sector split — broad advance (>4200 names) but semis/STAR50 still de-risking; grid/oil/resources bid on Brent intraday ~$98.59 validates import-inflation constraint on fiscal easing.
Caixin Q2 fund profits on AI rotation vs Jul 23 华虹 −12% — positioning still crowded in TMT even as tape breadth improves.
BlockBeats Jul 23 Korea foreign buying on Alphabet capex guide — regional semi beta re-rates while A-share hardware takes profit; Changxin Jul 27 IPO adds supply-chain headline risk.

chinaDivergences: Jul 23 Shanghai +0.25% vs STAR50 −3.78% vs semis (华虹 −12%+); Jul 22 ChiNext −3.23% vs Jul 23 +0.25% breadth recovery; Brent intraday ~$98.59 vs MOF fiscal tightening; Korea foreign inflow (BlockBeats Jul 23) vs A-share semi profit-taking.

signals.name: Alphabet cloud +82% but capex guide $195–205bn
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 22: Cloud $24.8bn (+82%); FY26 capex $195–205bn up from $180–190bn; Q2 capex $44.9bn; FCF negative; stock −4% AMC.
signals.mechanism: Revenue/capex raise validates AI cycle but cash-burn shifts falsifier from demand to profitability — mirrors TSMC Jul 16 margin fear.
signals.disprovedIf: Q3 FCF turns positive with capex guide unchanged and GOOG reclaims Jul 22 close within five sessions.

signals.name: Tesla opex +47% / FCF negative
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 22: adj EPS $0.33 vs ~$0.51 est (miss estimate); opex +47% to $4.35bn; FCF −$1.09bn; margin 1.4%; stock −5% AMC.
signals.mechanism: Revenue beat cannot offset AI/robotaxi spend — Mag 7 'show me' phase extends to auto/robotics capex.
signals.disprovedIf: Q3 opex growth <20% y/y with FCF positive and TSLA +5% within a week.

signals.name: Brent $94.07 settle + Red Sea tanker hits
signals.evidence: 华尔街见闻 Jul 23: Brent $94.07 (+3.36%, six-week high); CBS Jul 22 Houthis hit Saudi Red Sea tankers; Asia open spike (彭博).
signals.mechanism: Dual chokepoint (Hormuz + Red Sea) locks supply premium into 30y >5% and Jul 23 ECB hold narrative.
signals.disprovedIf: Brent official settle below $85 for three sessions with no new Red Sea incidents.

signals.name: 30y Treasury days above 5% — most since 2007
signals.evidence: 彭博今日图表 Jul 23: ~25 YTD days above 5%; 华尔街见闻: 12 consecutive days above 5% at ~5.14% Jul 22.

signals.name: Jul 23 A-share breadth recovery vs semis lag
signals.evidence: 金融界 Jul 23: Shanghai +0.25% to 3876.78, ChiNext +0.25%, >4200 stocks up, turnover ¥2.21tn; 华虹宏力 −12%+, STAR50 −3.78%; grid/oil led.
signals.mechanism: Oversold bounce on resources/grid while AI hardware still digests Mag 7 capex guide and Jul 22 profit-taking — breadth up, leadership narrow.
signals.disprovedIf: STAR50 −5% two sessions with Shanghai <3850 despite Brent settle falling below $90.

signals.name: Korea foreign inflow vs prior deleveraging
signals.evidence: Seoul Economic Daily Jul 22: foreign investors net bought ₩3.457tn on KOSPI over three sessions (Jul 20–22), Jul 22 alone ₩2.622tn; SK Hynix/Samsung led. Contrasts BlockBeats 63105 Jul 21 JPM deleveraging note.
signals.mechanism: Regional semi beta two-sided — Alphabet capex re-rates Korea while A-share hardware still profit-takes.
signals.disprovedIf: Foreign net selling resumes for a week with KOSPI −5% despite stable Mag 7 capex guides.

watchItems.headline: Jul 23 ECB hold + Lagarde presser (20:15/20:45 CET)
watchItems.why: STRONG oil + 30y >5% regime; Bloomberg inbox calendar.
watchItems.watch: Deposit rate expected hold 2.25% (post-Jun +25bp); Lagarde on oil pass-through vs growth."
watchItems.trigger: Hawkish hold with explicit second-hike signal and EUR higher while Brent ≥$94.
watchItems.invalidator: Dovish hold citing growth risks with 10y bund yields falling despite Brent ≥$92.

watchItems.headline: Mag 7 capex follow-through — Alphabet/Tesla AMC
watchItems.why: STRONG split earnings signal; Nasdaq futures −1% (Motley Fool)."
watchItems.watch: GOOG −4% / TSLA −5% AMC; CoreWeave +3.7%; SOX/Nasdaq Thu cash reaction.
watchItems.trigger: S&P closes below 7,450 with SOX −3% same week as capex guides hold.
watchItems.invalidator: Mag 7 reclaims AMC losses with SOX +3% and Brent settle <$88.

watchItems.headline: Brent $94.07 vs Red Sea / Hormuz flows
watchItems.watch: Official Thu Brent settle; Houthis Saudi embargo follow-through; Iran Hormuz threats.
watchItems.invalidator: Official settle below $85 for three sessions with Red Sea transits normalizing.

watchItems.headline: US initial jobless claims (Jul 23 20:30)
watchItems.why: Bloomberg inbox calendar; Fed hike debate live."
watchItems.watch: Consensus 211k vs prior 208k; 10y reaction with 30y already >5%.
watchItems.trigger: Claims beat estimate (>211k) with 10y >4.70% and Sep hike odds rising.
watchItems.invalidator: Claims miss estimate (<211k) with 10y <4.55% despite Brent ≥$92.

watchItems.headline: China SWIFT RMB tracker + MOFCOM briefing (Jul 23)
watchItems.why: Bloomberg inbox 09:00 SWIFT; 15:00 MOFCOM H1 briefing."
watchItems.watch: Jun SWIFT RMB share vs 2.75% prior; fiscal tightening vs trade data.
watchItems.trigger: RMB SWIFT share falls m/m with MOFCOM citing weak external demand.
watchItems.invalidator: RMB share rises with MOFCOM announcing new consumption/support measures.

watchItems.headline: 王毅上合组织外长会 (Jul 23–25)
watchItems.why: 彭博 央行和政府动态 diplomatic calendar."
watchItems.watch: Gilgit SCO FMM; US-China follow-through after Rubio meeting.
watchItems.trigger: Marketable trade/diplomatic breakthrough on AI/tariff channel.
watchItems.invalidator: Events pass with no policy delta priced in CNH or H-shares.

watchItems.headline: Jul 23 A-share close vs semis/STAR50 lag
watchItems.why: MODERATE breadth recovery signal; 金融界 official close."
watchItems.watch: Shanghai 3876.78 hold; 华虹/STAR50 vs grid/oil leaders; Mag 7 AMC spillover Thu.
watchItems.trigger: STAR50 −5% two sessions with Shanghai <3850 despite MOFCOM briefing.
watchItems.invalidator: ChiNext +3% within three sessions with STAR50 +5% and turnover >2.5tn yuan.

watchItems.headline: Intel Q2 earnings Jul 23 AMC
watchItems.why: IBM/TI mixed guides; AI infra split narrative."
watchItems.watch: Data Center/AI revenue vs Q1; 18A foundry commentary.
watchItems.trigger: DC/AI miss with guide cut and SOX −3% same session.
watchItems.invalidator: Beat with stable GM guide and Intel +5% next day.

sources: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 (Jul 23), 金融界/格隆汇 (Jul 23 A-share close), 第一财经 (Jul 23 oil/Houthi/earnings), Caixin (Jul 23 mutual funds), Seoul Economic Daily (Jul 22 Korea inflows), 新浪财经 (Jul 23 长鑫科技), CNBC (Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 earnings), Motley Fool (Jul 22 US close), 华尔街见闻 3777720 (Jul 23 breakfast), CBS (Jul 22 Red Sea), MOF (Jul 22 H1 fiscal), Caixin (Jul 23 Nike/Topsports).
singleSource: Bloomberg 今日图表 PNG at web/public/inbox-charts/bloomberg-2026-07-23.png (30y days above 5%, ~28 in 2026 per chart). Jul 23 oil ~$98.59 is intraday (第一财经), not settle — Jul 22 settle Brent $94.07 retained for settle figure. STAR50 −3.78% from 金融界 companion article (stock.jrj.com.cn Jul 23). ECB hold / US claims pending at publish (20:15/20:30 Beijing). Glassnode not merged — no fresh capture. Rejected BlockBeats 63149 (page dates only 2025 — Korea/Changxin replaced with Seoul Economic Daily + 新浪财经). Evening slot (Beijing 20:00): Jul 23 China official close merged; Jul 22 US close + AMC earnings spine.

marketOverview.note: Qualitative desk color from 彭博财经早茶 — not official closes.

source.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

items.label: 美国股市
items.text: 标普500指数收低，科技股回落抵消能源股涨势

items.label: 中概股
items.text: 金龙中国指数下跌，Maase和网易对指数拖累最大

items.label: 美国债市
items.text: 国债在清淡交投中走低，对美联储加息的预期升温

items.label: 外汇市场
items.text: 彭博美元指数持稳，日元回吐早前时候因加息预期而录得的涨幅

items.label: 欧洲股债
items.text: 德债和英债下跌，油气价格飙升推高加息预期。企业财报提振欧洲股市，市场聚焦欧洲央行利率决策

items.label: 能源
items.text: 油价升至六周高位，美伊淡化和谈前景，且全球供应中断的情况持续加剧

items.label: 金属
items.text: 逢低买盘推动黄金延续涨势，伦敦市场铜价小幅下跌

marketDashboard.note: Equities, FX, gold futures, and Brent futures use the latest two Yahoo daily closes (Brent row is Yahoo BZ=F — not the same print as CNBC official settle when both appear); US Treasuries use the official daily yield curve (bp vs prior print); BTC is CoinGecko 24h change; funding compares adjacent OKX prints. Snapshot captured at generate time — not live on the page.
